title: Prosper Plast Corinthian style Round Planter/Flower Pot (40cm,Terracotta)
features: Attractive Corinthian style Round Planter, suitable for a number of planting ideas (vegetables, salads, small shrubs, lavender, iris or tulips). Flowerpot comes with solid bottom but hole can be easily made

Resistant to weather conditions, cold and UV radiation, suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Designed for home, garden, balcony or terrace. Nice, simple and delicate pattern gives it a unique visual effect.
High Quality and Durable Plastic Construction; Lightweight
Available in Terracotta, White and Black colour and few sizes: 11cm, 13cm,15cm,17cm, 20cm, 25cm, 30cm, 35cm, 40cm, 45cm, 50cm, 55cm and 65cm.
description: Product Description Transform Your Space with Our Versatile Flower Pots Whether you're looking to enhance your indoor décor or create a stunning outdoor garden, our beautifully designed flower pots come in a variety of styles, sizes, and shapes to perfectly suit every space. Previous page Indoor Flower Pots Discover our stunning range of indoor plant pots, designed to enhance any living space. Outdoor Flower Pots Our Outdoor Flower Pots range is perfect for enhancing gardens, patios, and balconies. Hanging Pots Hanging Pots range features a stylish options, perfect for adding a touch of greenery to any space. Raised planters Raised pots range offers stylish, elevated designs that bring height and elegance to any space. Concrete effect pots Concrete Effect Pots bring a modern, industrial style to any space with a concrete look design. Next page 1 Indoor Flower Pots 2 Outdoor Flower Pots 3 Hanging Pots 4 Raised planters 5 Concrete effect pots Key Features of Our Flower Pots Diverse Designs From sleek modern styles to classic rustic looks, our flower pots are designed to complement any décor. Choose from vibrant colours and unique patterns that bring life to your spaces. Variety of Sizes Our collection includes pots in multiple sizes, perfect for everything from small succulents to large statement plants. Ideal for creating layered displays or grouping smaller pots for a lush effect. Shapes for Every Need Explore various shapes, including round, square, and rectangular pots, to suit your planting preferences and space constraints. Unique shapes like hanging pots and wall-mounted options maximise your space and creativity. Indoor and Outdoor Use Made from durable materials, our pots withstand the elements, making them perfect for gardens, balconies, or indoor settings.
